creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 186303
v1

- Fails if PREFIX != LOCALBASE, see below
- Contains *.cpp files but doesn't respect CXXFLAGS e.g., -std=c++11
- Uses += for LIB_DEPENDS despite no slave port referencing the variable

$ poudriere testport -Pj 103i386 devel/py-pyicu
[...]
--MAKE_ENV--
PYICU_INCLUDES="/prefix/py27-pyicu-1.9.4_1/include"  PYICU_CFLAGS="-w:-DPYICU_VER=\"1.9.4\""  PYICU_LFLAGS="-L/prefix/py27-pyicu-1.9.4_1/lib" ...
[...]
building '_icu' extension
creating build/temp.freebsd-10.3-RELEASE-p20-i386-2.7
cc -DNDEBUG -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -fPIC -I/prefix/py27-pyicu-1.9.4_1/include -I/usr/local/include/python2.7 -c _icu.cpp -o build/temp.freebsd-10.3-RELEASE-p20-i386-2.7/_icu.o -w -DPYICU_VER="1.9.4"
In file included from _icu.cpp:27:
./common.h:90:10: fatal error: 'unicode/utypes.h' file not found
#include <unicode/utypes.h>
         ^
1 error generated.

build log: http://sprunge.us/AdBg
